mainEntity.name: Secondary injuries from ladder fall comp in Draper?
mainEntity.text: Secondary injuries from ladder fall comp in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Covered if proximately caused; e.g., limp from ankle fracture causing back pain.

suggestedAnswer.text: Draper: Nexus via doc opinion. Chain PT records. Insurers sever—appeal with causation IME.
